Widget that displays an enlarged image of a card, loading the image based on the card's info or showi...
Displays a scrollable horizontal list of Archidekt deck listings with dynamic card sizing.
A widget for adjusting card sizes using a slider.
Represents a specific card instance, defined by its CardInfo and a particular printing.
Represents metadata for a specific variation of a card within a set.
Represents a complete deck, including metadata, zones, cards, and sideboard plans.
